name: Denge Yatirim Holding A.S.
summary: Denge Yatirim Holding A.S. engages in financial service, and domestic and foreign trade activities in Turkey and internationally. The company offers long term loans, export prefinancing, import finance, receivables and stock financing, trade and project finance, project finance loans, investment loans, and international payment and collection works, as well as other loans. Denge Yatirim Holding A.S. is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.
